div1.entryFree: Namely, to mention by name; that is to say: n., no time to recover hair lost by nature, Err. II, 2, 103. except it be the last, n. some love, V, 56. to him that owes it, n. this young prince, John II, 248. as well appeareth by the cause you come, n. to appeal each other, R2 I, 1, 27. the borrowed glories . . . n. the crown, H5 II, 4, 81. to many simple gulls, n. to Hastings, Derby, Buckingham, R3 I, 3, 329.
